name.en-US: EMS-Desk Elsys LoRaWAN Desk Occupancy Sensor
name.pt-BR: EMS-Desk Sensor de Ocupação de Mesa LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys EMS-Desk — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors motion and temperature. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys EMS-Desk — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora movimento e temperatura. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
